title: Quikr International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Quikr International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Quikr International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
